caption: A group of people are seated in tiered rows of a large assembly hall with light-colored wooden paneling. The individuals, predominantly men and a few women, are dressed in a variety of attire, including white collared shirts, traditional Indian clothing like sarees and kurtas, and some in dark suits. They are seated in a structured arrangement, facing forward, with expressions that range from neutral to attentive. Some individuals have their hands folded or resting on their laps, while one man in the center rests his chin on his hand, appearing pensive. Across the sequence, there is virtually no movement; the people remain in their fixed positions, and the camera angle stays constant. No on-screen text, logos, or electronic equipment are visible, maintaining a static scene of a formal gathering in a legislative or council-style setting.
